Pokémon may migrate from a Game Boy

HGSS.294.0032:
You are using a different Nintendo DS,
or its internal clock has been altered.\f
If the game’s time setting is changed,
you will not be able to migrate\r

Would you like to change your game’s
time setting to match the Nintendo DS?
